strengths: ~14 years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive within technical work
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in AI — only brief recent exposure
No evidence of director-level IC influence, advising strategic customers, or cross-org technical strategy
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no deep cloud platform architecture track record

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / built AI products
No director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
Broad full-stack engineering longevity with some AI-agent tooling exposure

response.justification: The role requires a director-level IC with 15 years of engineering plus recognized AI expertise, cloud platform fluency, and the ability to advise strategic customers. The candidate has ~14 years of solid full-stack and polyglot engineering and founded an open-source GIS platform (entrepreneurial signal), but the only AI evidence is recent, light contribution to MCP code generators and agentic tooling at re:cinq — no shipped AI products, no ML research, no advanced AI degree. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz, not platform-level strategy. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping future cloud product direction, or operating at principal/director scope. Strong senior engineer, but a significant gap against the principal AI-strategy bar.
